drive_dates: ● Online Test – 5 th August 2025 ● ON Campus - 18 th August 2025

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Remuneration: Year 1 : CTC 5.5 LPA (4.5 LPA Fixed + 1 Lac Bonus) Year 2 : CTC 8 LPA (6 LPA Fixed + 2 Lac Bonus) Year 3 : CTC 12.5 LPA (8.5 LPA + 4 Lac Bonus) Note : The annual bonus each year and the fixed component in Year 3 are performance-based.

selection_process_steps: Round 3: Pre-placement talk followed by Technical
HR Rounds (on campus) followed by spot offers.
